title: Add score-optimizer-agent skill for CLI optimizer runs

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Creating a new skills/score-optimizer-agent skill with direct CLI optimizer usage, parameter guidance, DRY identifier-resolution notes, and operational notes learned from live optimizer runs on develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created skills/score-optimizer-agent/SKILL.md. It documents the direct CLI optimizer path, the startup sequence inside the Tactus procedure, DRY identifier resolution for --scorecard/--score, the default alignment objective, the need to use the procedure/YAML path for non-default objectives, and the rule that missing metadata must fail fast rather than degrade into a score outcome.
